---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for Kawa
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---
 
## What is the problem you are trying to solve?
 
A clear description of the use case or pain point that this feature would address.
 
## Describe the solution you would like
 
A clear description of what you want to happen.
 
## Describe alternatives you have considered
 
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.
 
## Pipeline stage (if applicable)
 
Which stage of the Kawa pipeline does this relate to?
 
- [ ] Audio resampling
- [ ] Voice activity detection / diarisation
- [ ] Noise filtering / audio enhancement
- [ ] Speech-to-text inference
- [ ] Post-processing
- [ ] API surface or developer experience
- [ ] Other
 
## Additional context
 
Any other context, mock-ups, or examples that would help us understand the request.
